title: Frequently Asked Questions
heading_chain: [ 2. What is a Single Sign-On Platform? ]
[ 3. What are the key benefits of using MeriPehchaan? ]
[ 5. Is it safe to share the Aadhaar Card details with MeriPehchaan? ]
[ 6. Can I log in with my linked verification IDs like Mobile, Aadhaar, PAN, etc? ]
[ 7. What is the login process for MeriPehchaan? ]
[ 9. How can I contact the MeriPehchaan team in case of any complaint/query? ]
[ 10. What is the session expiry time of MeriPehchaan ]
[ 11. I am unable to get an OTP on my mobile number, what should I do? ]
[ 12. Even after successful login to MeriPehchaan, I am getting “user is not authorized to access the service” while accessing certain services? ]
[ 13. I am being asked to perform two-step multifactor authentication on every login. What should I do? ]

[ 15. While accessing services, I am getting an error with the text: Access Denied. What should I do? ]
heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sub_section: [ 15. While accessing services, I am getting an error with the text: Access Denied. What should I do? ]
text:
##### [ 10. What is the session expiry time of MeriPehchaan ]

By default, the MeriPehchaan session expiry time is of 24 hours and user will be logged out of all the applications on its expiry and will be asked to login again.

##### [ 11. I am unable to get an OTP on my mobile number, what should I do? ]

If you are not able to get SMS of OTP, please check your network connection or wait for a while. If the issue still persists, contact support.

##### [ 12. Even after successful login to MeriPehchaan, I am getting “user is not authorized to access the service” while accessing certain services? ]

You are not allowed to access that service. Please contact the service owner.

##### [ 13. I am being asked to perform two-step multifactor authentication on every login. What should I do? ]

When you login, you may remember the known environment. Click on Remember My Device to remember your device/ environment. If any of the parameters IP, Browser ID, or OS changes, you will again be asked to perform a two-step authentication.

##### [ 14. I am being asked for a password on several integrated services on service session expiry. What should I do? ]

Certain services may maintain their own session timeout. If a session is idle for that time (session timeout), you will be asked to enter the password again to login back into the respective service.

##### [ 15. While accessing services, I am getting an error with the text: Access Denied. What should I do? ]

If you are not authorized to access the service, kindly contact the concerned Service Owner. However, you can access the MeriPehchaan dashboard or any other service.

By default, the MeriPehchaan session expiry time is of 24 hours and user will be logged out of all the applications on its expiry and will be asked to login again.

##### [ 11. I am unable to get an OTP on my mobile number, what should I do? ]

If you are not able to get SMS of OTP, please check your network connection or wait for a while. If the issue still persists, contact support.

##### [ 12. Even after successful login to MeriPehchaan, I am getting “user is not authorized to access the service” while accessing certain services? ]

You are not allowed to access that service. Please contact the service owner.

##### [ 13. I am being asked to perform two-step multifactor authentication on every login. What should I do? ]

When you login, you may remember the known environment. Click on Remember My Device to remember your device/ environment. If any of the parameters IP, Browser ID, or OS changes, you will again be asked to perform a two-step authentication.

##### [ 14. I am being asked for a password on several integrated services on service session expiry. What should I do? ]

Certain services may maintain their own session timeout. If a session is idle for that time (session timeout), you will be asked to enter the password again to login back into the respective service.

##### [ 15. While accessing services, I am getting an error with the text: Access Denied. What should I do? ]

If you are not authorized to access the service, kindly contact the concerned Service Owner. However, you can access the MeriPehchaan dashboard or any other service.
